series_metadata.series_description: Loan Files will be organized by project name, by fiscal year, by loan type to include the following types of loans: housing development, housing development assistance program, Financial Adjustment Factor, Capital Funding to End Homelessness Initiative, Recycled Tax Credit Assistance Program, Neighborhood Stabilization Program, Community Improvement Program loans.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Two years affordability period of project (as that term is defined by Internal Revenue Code) is ended. If included in audit it would be year loan is made and not when it is paid off
